global_description: A small, compact bird with a rounded body and a short tail. It features a brown upper body with a lighter, buff-colored underside. The wings and tail are barred with darker brown patterns, and it has a distinctive white eyebrow stripe above the eye.
discriminative_attributes: Darker brown barred wings and tail

part_details.body: Rounded, compact, brown upper with buff underside
part_details.head: Rounded with a white eyebrow stripe

spatial_relations: The white eyebrow stripe is above the eye
The wings are attached to the sides of the body
The tail extends from the rear of the body
